title: GUI Opened Movements (Happy Feet)
description: A client only mod alloweds movements while having active screens.
body:
Move Like a Pro! - By Happy Feet

 

The mod allows you to do movement inputs while having active screens/guis.

 

The mod REQUIRED on both servers and clients so it is no considered as a cheat.

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k3ldE9luvzo

 

 

The mod will not active when:

- In a single player world and the screen is a "pause screen" (where the game pauses by the screen)

- A text input field, i.e. search bar is active in the screen
